name: radar
description: Native radar / spider chart — items rated across multiple axes.
purpose: Use to compare 2–4 options across the same 4–8 criteria. Each option becomes a polygon; overlap shows where strengths align.

series.description: One li per series (option). Format: `Label — v1, v2, v3, v4, …` one number per axis.

skeleton:
<!-- _class: radar -->

`Performance · Cost · UX · Security · Maturity`

## How we stack up across the buying criteria.

- Option A — 8, 6, 7, 9, 5
- Option B — 6, 9, 8, 7, 8
- Option C — 7, 7, 9, 6, 7
